name: Cajun Yam-Pecan Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Ground Toasted Pecans, or Pecan Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, sauté the green onions briefly in oil.
2. Add Cajun seasonings and continue to sauté for an additional 30 seconds to develop flavors.
3. Stir in yams and chicken stock. Season with a little salt.
4. Cook until the yams are soft enough to puree.
5. Puree the mixture into a smooth soup.
6. Stir in ground roasted pecans. Season with salt to taste.
7. Just before serving, stir in the reserved green onion tops.
